title: Coding setup
content:
[![flickr photo](http://farm1.static.flickr.com/179/468205969_fcc2f420d3_m.jpg)](http://www.flickr.com/photos/macsfbox/468205969/)

.. minus the coder, me, that is.

During the past week, I have been sitting on my working desk, both at the office and at home, trying to revise the current code for the company's internal database in order to put it online. I wasn't successful.

However, this morning I pulled out my long forgotten "sleepy chair" (that's how I call that brown thing in the photo) and decided to do some work while sitting in it -- and guess what, I've managed to finish the code revision.

I guess I'll need to get one "sleepy chair" at the office too. :D
